key_themes: AI data center power demand and nuclear renaissance
Record backlog growth ($7.3B, +50% YoY) and strong 2026 guidance (EPS $4.55–$4.70)
Strategic expansion into uranium enrichment for defense nuclear fuel
Leadership in naval propulsion, SMR infrastructure, and commercial nuclear
Valuation concerns after 129% 1-year rally (PE ~66, some Underweight ratings)
summary: BWX Technologies is strongly positioned in the nuclear resurgence fueled by AI power needs, defense contracts, and commercial opportunities. It delivered record 2025 results with 18% revenue growth, a massive backlog increase, and issued robust 2026 guidance for continued double-digit expansion in EPS, EBITDA, and free cash flow. While the stock's massive run has led to rich valuations, analyst downgrades on multiples, and some profit-taking (e.g. ARK trimming), investor and social sentiment remains bullish on its real-world leadership versus more speculative nuclear names.[[1]](https://finance.yahoo.com/quote/BWXT/)[[3]](https://investors.bwxt.com/news-releases/news-release-details/bwx-technologies-reports-fourth-quarter-and-full-year-2025)
sources: 25+ recent news articles, earnings releases, and analyst notes (BWXT IR, Zacks, Yahoo Finance, Barron's, TipRanks), 15+ relevant X posts and investor discussions on $BWXT/nuclear themes (keyword and semantic searches, April 2026)
